programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat : Sandal Joki Pembawa Hoki
The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: The husband of Margaret Keane, a phenomenal painter, wrongfully claims credit for her works and enjoys her success until a legal battle between the two reveals the truth to the world.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Rick, a fading actor, and Cliff, his stunt double, struggle to find relevant work in Hollywood and go through various twists and turns in order to restart their careers.

programme.title: The Pianist
programme.desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Equipped with an elaborate plan, clear vision and unwavering determination, Richard Williams, a sports coach, encourages his daughters, Venus and Serena, to become tennis champions.

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: After witnessing the horrifying murder of his father, a young man sets out to seek retribution and attempts to bring down a crime lord.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon, a symbologist, learns about the revival of a secret organisation aiming to destroy the Vatican, he immediately joins forces with a scientist to stop the attack.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Showdown of the Unbeatables
programme.desc: Episode 101 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features BCB Air Cannon vs. Line X coating; an automated paintball turret vs. a worlds record holding slingshot marksman; and the RX Rock Breaker vs. the inpenetrable Brown Safe.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne joins his foodie friend Amy Luttrell to help cook breakfast for his friends at the Bonorong Wildlife Sanctuary after having a cuddle with some of Tasmania's unique animals. On his way down to Hobart Ben stops off at a boutique, family-owned Stefano Lubiana Winery, which overlooks the picturesque River Derwent.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne explores the infamous Salamana Market in Hobart where he speaks with local producers about their Fresh Tasmanian Produce. Ben spends his evening enjoying the Hobart nightlife.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: Diamond River Hunters
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: Jet Truck
programme.desc: The Darnell's 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: Jet Truck
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

Alin and Farel met again at campus because Farel was accused of spying in the women's restroom. Farel holds a grudge against Alin and often plays pranks on her. Will they fall in love?

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Rocky III
programme.desc: Rocky, the reigning world champion, accepts a boxing challenge from Clubber Lang and loses the match. He also ends up losing his credibility as a champion, and has to fight to get it back.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: Sam and Mikaela once again join forces with Optimus Prime and the Autobots to save Earth from The Fallen, the ruthless robot who teams up with the Decepticons.

programme.title: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: Inspector Lee and Detective Carter arrive in Paris following an assassination attempt on Ambassador Han. There, they encounter a woman who may hold the key to uncovering the Triad's secret leaders.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: After Set, the Egyptian God of darkness, kills his brother and seizes the throne, he enslaves the kingdom. However, a flawed mortal, Bek, and the God of the sky Horus rise to challenge him.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: John, son of Sarah Connor, sends a reprogrammed Terminator to protect his younger self, who also holds the key to humanity's survival, from the T-1000, an advanced robot created by Skynet.

programme.title: Billionaire Story
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: James' Going Places
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Hot Door Night
programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Destined
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: AI Romantic
programme.desc: Ah Bao (Ali Lee), a high-end AI, accidentally got lost when leaving the factory and happened to land into Gu family. Ah Bao assisted Gu family with various strange tasks. At the same time, she detects a computer virus that may terminate her life.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.
